data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Self-check ACs ✓ — (1) 3 new test functions with test_review_gate_rebase prefix defined and invoked; (2) Each uses mktemp -d with _TEST_TMPDIRS trap; (3) Each writes .git/REBASE_HEAD AND .git/rebase-merge/orig-head (NOT .git/ORIG_HEAD); (4) .test-index RED marker added; (5) Tests assert on hook exit code (behavioral, not structural as the primary observable surface)
